message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
participant "Data Consumer" as DC
participant "Data Source" as DS

alt [No updates]
DC -> DS : <u><color:blue>1a.</color></u> GET [query URL]
else
DC -> DS : <u><color:blue>1b.</color></u> POST [base query URL] with
end

alt [No updates]
DS --> DC : <u><color:blue>2a.</color></u> search-response Bundle with new records\n(use most recent meta.lastUpdated in filter for subsequent polls)
else
DS --> DC : <u><color:blue>2b.</color></u> Empty search-response bundle
end

opt
loop
DC -> DS : <u><color:blue>3a.</color></u> GET [next URL]
DS --> DC : <u><color:blue>3b.</color></u> search-response with Bundle of next results
end
end
@enduml
